title: neoregelia carolinae
intro: Neoregelia carolinae is a species of bromeliad plant, also known as a tank bromeliad, characterized by its distinctive rosette-shaped leaves that form a water-holding tank. Traditionally, Neoregelia carolinae has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Neoregelia carolinae is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
